reason: Confirms lib/router/ is the home for routing concerns — shell_transitions.dart lives there beside app_router.dart.
Establishes the AppMotion + centralized-theme conventions the new shell_transitions helper must respect.
flutter build web is the truth signal; flutter analyze is intentionally skipped on this repo's CJK path.
The mutable _ShellNavSignal is module-level state; the spec's stance on globals vs notifiers should be respected and the deviation documented inline.
Pre-modification rule: before adding a new transition helper, confirm no existing one exists; AppMotion tokens are the single source for duration + curve.
Establishes the GlobalKey crash this task is preventing — required context for why the per-route architecture is mandatory.
Establishes the original polish contract — same visual goal (shared-axis slide, ±0.06 offset, AppMotion.nav timing, emphasized curve) must be matched.
